import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/pages/Planificacion.tsx");import __vite__cjsImport0_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=03ff417f"; const useState = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useState"]; const useEffect = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useEffect"];
import { supabase } from "/src/lib/supabase.js";
import { useAuth } from "/src/context/AuthContext.tsx";
import { CheckCircle, Clock, History, User, Check, X } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=2e206524";
import { Calendar, dateFnsLocalizer } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-big-calendar.js?v=46456d30";
import __vite__cjsImport5_reactBigCalendar_lib_addons_dragAndDrop from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-big-calendar_lib_addons_dragAndDrop.js?v=32350f70"; const dragAndDropModule = __vite__cjsImport5_reactBigCalendar_lib_addons_dragAndDrop;
import "/node_modules/react-big-calendar/lib/addons/dragAndDrop/styles.css";
import { format, parse, startOfWeek, getDay } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/date-fns.js?v=204f30a5";
import { es } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/date-fns_locale.js?v=b1bb0c3c";
import "/node_modules/react-big-calendar/lib/css/react-big-calendar.css";
var _jsxFileName = "c:/Users/Shadow/Desktop/hotelops-pro/src/pages/Planificacion.tsx";
import __vite__cjsImport10_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=03ff417f"; const _jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport10_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
const locales = { "es": es };
const localizer = dateFnsLocalizer({
	format,
	parse,
	startOfWeek: () => startOfWeek(new Date(), { weekStartsOn: 1 }),
	getDay,
	locales
});
const withDragAndDrop = typeof dragAndDropModule === "function" ? dragAndDropModule : dragAndDropModule.default || dragAndDropModule;
const DnDCalendar = withDragAndDrop(Calendar);
_c = DnDCalendar;
export default function Planificacion() {
	_s();
	const { profile } = useAuth();
	const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([]);
	const [history, setHistory] = useState([]);
	const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
	const [msg, setMsg] = useState({
		type: "",
		text: ""
	});
	const [completingTask, setCompletingTask] = useState(null);
	const [allElements, setAllElements] = useState([]);
	const [selectedElements, setSelectedElements] = useState([]);
	const [notes, setNotes] = useState("");
	useEffect(() => {
		fetchTasks();
		fetchHistory();
		fetchElements();
	}, []);
	const fetchTasks = async () => {
		try {
			const { data, error } = await supabase.from("mantenimiento_preventivo").select("*").order("proxima_fecha");
			if (error) throw error;
			setTasks(data);
		} catch (error) {
			console.error("Error fetching maintenance:", error);
		}
	};
	const fetchHistory = async () => {
		try {
			const { data, error } = await supabase.from("historial_mantenimiento").select(`
          *,
          tarea:tarea_id (titulo, frecuencia),
          perfil:completado_por (nombre)
        `).order("completado_el", { ascending: false }).limit(20);
			if (error) throw error;
			setHistory(data);
		} catch (error) {
			console.error("Error fetching history:", error);
		} finally {
			setLoading(false);
		}
	};
	const fetchElements = async () => {
		try {
			const { data, error } = await supabase.from("elementos_mantenimiento").select("*");
			if (error) throw error;
			setAllElements(data);
		} catch (error) {
			console.error("Error fetching elements:", error);
		}
	};
	const calculateNextDate = (currentDate, frequency) => {
		const date = new Date(currentDate);
		switch (frequency) {
			case "diaria":
				date.setDate(date.getDate() + 1);
				break;
			case "semanal":
				date.setDate(date.getDate() + 7);
				break;
			case "mensual":
				date.setMonth(date.getMonth() + 1);
				break;
			case "trimestral":
				date.setMonth(date.getMonth() + 3);
				break;
			case "semestral":
				date.setMonth(date.getMonth() + 6);
				break;
			case "anual":
				date.setFullYear(date.getFullYear() + 1);
				break;
			default: date.setDate(date.getDate() + 1);
		}
		return date.toISOString().split("T")[0];
	};
	const handleCompleteTask = async (e) => {
		e.preventDefault();
		if (!completingTask) return;
		setLoading(true);
		try {
			const todayString = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
			const nextDate = calculateNextDate(todayString, completingTask.frecuencia);
			// 1. Guardar en historial
			const { error: histError } = await supabase.from("historial_mantenimiento").insert([{
				tarea_id: completingTask.id,
				completado_por: profile.id,
				notas: notes,
				items_completados: selectedElements
			}]);
			if (histError) throw histError;
			// 2. Actualizar tarea original con nueva fecha
			const { error: taskError } = await supabase.from("mantenimiento_preventivo").update({
				proxima_fecha: nextDate,
				ultima_ejecucion: new Date().toISOString()
			}).eq("id", completingTask.id);
			if (taskError) throw taskError;
			setMsg({
				type: "success",
				text: `Tarea "${completingTask.titulo}" completada. Próxima revisión: ${nextDate}`
			});
			setCompletingTask(null);
			setSelectedElements([]);
			setNotes("");
			fetchTasks();
			fetchHistory();
		} catch (error) {
			setMsg({
				type: "error",
				text: `Error al completar tarea: ${error.message}`
			});
		} finally {
			setLoading(false);
		}
	};
	const isOverdue = (dateString) => {
		const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];
		return dateString <= today;
	};
	const calendarEvents = tasks.map((task) => {
		const [year, month, day] = task.proxima_fecha.split("-");
		const startDate = new Date(year, month - 1, day, 9, 0);
		const endDate = new Date(year, month - 1, day, 10, 0);
		return {
			id: task.id,
			title: task.titulo,
			start: startDate,
			end: endDate,
			resource: task,
			isOverdue: isOverdue(task.proxima_fecha)
		};
	});
	const eventStyleGetter = (event) => {
		const backgroundColor = event.isOverdue ? "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2)" : "rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2)";
		const borderColor = event.isOverdue ? "#ef4444" : "#6366f1";
		const color = event.isOverdue ? "#fca5a5" : "#a5b4fc";
		return { style: {
			backgroundColor,
			borderRadius: "6px",
			opacity: .9,
			color,
			border: `1px solid ${borderColor}`,
			display: "block",
			fontSize: "0.8rem",
			fontWeight: "bold",
			padding: "2px 6px"
		} };
	};
	const onEventDrop = async ({ event, start, end }) => {
		const adjustedDate = new Date(start);
		// Ajustar a Local Time si cae por husos y enviamos con Z
		const newDateStr = adjustedDate.toISOString().split("T")[0];
		// UI Local - Optimist Update
		const updatedTasks = tasks.map((t) => {
			if (t.id === event.id) {
				return {
					...t,
					proxima_fecha: newDateStr
				};
			}
			return t;
		});
		setTasks(updatedTasks);
		try {
			const { error } = await supabase.from("mantenimiento_preventivo").update({ proxima_fecha: newDateStr }).eq("id", event.id);
			if (error) throw error;
			setMsg({
				type: "success",
				text: `Tarea "${event.title}" reprogramada para el ${newDateStr}`
			});
		} catch (err) {
			console.error(err);
			setMsg({
				type: "error",
				text: "Error reprogramando tarea. Se revirtieron cambios."
			});
			fetchTasks();
		}
	};
	return /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
		className: "planificacion-page animate-fade-in",
		children: [
			/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
				className: "page-header mb-xl",
				children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", { children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("h1", {
					className: "page-title",
					children: "Planificación de Mantenimiento"
				}, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 224,
					columnNumber: 11
				}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("p", {
					className: "page-subtitle",
					children: "Revisiones preventivas y tareas recurrentes"
				}, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 225,
					columnNumber: 11
				}, this)] }, void 0, true, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 223,
					columnNumber: 9
				}, this)
			}, void 0, false, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 222,
				columnNumber: 7
			}, this),
			msg.text && /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
				className: `alert alert-${msg.type === "success" ? "success" : "danger"} mb-lg`,
				children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("span", { children: msg.text }, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 231,
					columnNumber: 11
				}, this)
			}, void 0, false, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 230,
				columnNumber: 9
			}, this),
			/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("section", {
				className: "mb-xl glass-card p-none overflow-hidden custom-calendar-wrapper",
				style: { height: "600px" },
				children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(DnDCalendar, {
					localizer,
					events: calendarEvents,
					startAccessor: "start",
					endAccessor: "end",
					style: {
						height: "100%",
						padding: "1rem"
					},
					culture: "es",
					messages: {
						next: "Sig",
						previous: "Ant",
						today: "Hoy",
						month: "Mes",
						week: "Semana",
						day: "Día",
						agenda: "Agenda",
						date: "Fecha",
						time: "Hora",
						event: "Evento",
						noEventsInRange: "No hay tareas de mantenimiento en este rango."
					},
					eventPropGetter: eventStyleGetter,
					onSelectEvent: (event) => setCompletingTask(event.resource),
					onEventDrop,
					resizable: false,
					views: [
						"month",
						"week",
						"agenda"
					],
					defaultView: "month",
					popup: true
				}, void 0, false, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 237,
					columnNumber: 9
				}, this)
			}, void 0, false, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 236,
				columnNumber: 7
			}, this),
			/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
				className: "grid-2 gap-xl",
				children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("section", { children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
					className: "section-header mb-md flex items-center gap-sm",
					children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Calendar, {
						className: "text-accent",
						size: 20
					}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 271,
						columnNumber: 13
					}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("h2", {
						className: "text-lg",
						children: "Tareas Programadas"
					}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 272,
						columnNumber: 13
					}, this)]
				}, void 0, true, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 270,
					columnNumber: 11
				}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
					className: "flex flex-column gap-md",
					children: tasks.length === 0 ? /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
						className: "glass-card p-xl text-center text-muted",
						children: "No hay tareas programadas. Configúralas en el panel de Administración."
					}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 277,
						columnNumber: 15
					}, this) : tasks.map((task) => /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
						className: `glass-card p-lg flex justify-between items-center ${isOverdue(task.proxima_fecha) ? "border-l-4 border-danger" : "border-l-4 border-accent"}`,
						children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", { children: [
							/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
								className: "flex items-center gap-sm mb-xs",
								children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("h3", {
									className: "font-bold",
									children: task.titulo
								}, void 0, false, {
									fileName: _jsxFileName,
									lineNumber: 285,
									columnNumber: 23
								}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("span", {
									className: "badge badge-secondary text-xs",
									children: task.frecuencia
								}, void 0, false, {
									fileName: _jsxFileName,

								}, this)]
							}, void 0, true, {
								fileName: _jsxFileName,

							}, this),
							/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("p", {
								className: "text-sm text-muted mb-sm",
								children: task.descripcion
							}, void 0, false, {
								fileName: _jsxFileName,
								lineNumber: 288,
								columnNumber: 21
							}, this),
							/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
								className: "flex items-center gap-md text-xs",
								children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("span", {
									className: `flex items-center gap-xs ${isOverdue(task.proxima_fecha) ? "text-danger font-bold" : "text-muted"}`,
									children: [
										/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Clock, { size: 12 }, void 0, false, {
											fileName: _jsxFileName,
											lineNumber: 291,
											columnNumber: 25
										}, this),
										" Próxima: ",
										task.proxima_fecha
									]
								}, void 0, true, {
									fileName: _jsxFileName,
									lineNumber: 290,
									columnNumber: 23
								}, this), task.ultima_ejecucion && /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("span", {
									className: "flex items-center gap-xs text-muted",
									children: [
										/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(CheckCircle, { size: 12 }, void 0, false, {
											fileName: _jsxFileName,
											lineNumber: 295,

										}, this),

										new Date(task.ultima_ejecucion).toLocaleDateString()
									]
								}, void 0, true, {
									fileName: _jsxFileName,
									lineNumber: 294,

								}, this)]
							}, void 0, true, {
								fileName: _jsxFileName,

							}, this)
						] }, void 0, true, {
							fileName: _jsxFileName,
							lineNumber: 283,

						}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("button", {

							onClick: () => setCompletingTask(task),
							children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(Check, { size: 16 }, void 0, false, {
								fileName: _jsxFileName,

							}, this), " Completar"]
						}, void 0, true, {

				}, this)] }, void 0, true, {
					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 269,

				}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("section", { children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {

					children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV(History, {
						className: "text-accent",
						size: 20
					}, void 0, false, {
						fileName: _jsxFileName,
						lineNumber: 315,

					}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("h2", {

					}, void 0, false, {

					}, this)]

					children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
						className: "p-none scroll-y",
						style: { maxHeight: "600px" },
						children: history.length === 0 ? /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
							className: "p-xl text-center text-muted",
							children: "Aún no hay registros en el historial."
						}, void 0, false, {
							fileName: _jsxFileName,
							lineNumber: 322,
							columnNumber: 17
						}, this) : /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("table", {
							className: "config-table",
							children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("thead", { children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("tr", { children: [
								/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("th", { children: "Tarea" }, void 0, false, {
									fileName: _jsxFileName,
									lineNumber: 326,
									columnNumber: 25
								}, this),

								}, this),
								/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("th", { children: "Usuario" }, void 0, false, {

								}, this)
							] }, void 0, true, {
								fileName: _jsxFileName,

								fileName: _jsxFileName,

							}, this), /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("tbody", { children: history.map((h) => /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("tr", { children: [
								/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("td", { children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
									className: "flex flex-column",

					fileName: _jsxFileName,

					fileName: _jsxFileName,
					lineNumber: 313,
					columnNumber: 9
				}, this)]
			}, void 0, true, {
				fileName: _jsxFileName,
				lineNumber: 267,
				columnNumber: 7
			}, this),
			completingTask && /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
				className: "modal-overlay",
				onClick: () => setCompletingTask(null),
				children: /* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
					className: "modal-content",
					onClick: (e) => e.stopPropagation(),
					children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("div", {
						className: "modal-header",
						children: [/* @__PURE__ */ _jsxDEV("h2", { children: "Registrar Ejecución" }, void 0, false, {
							fileName: _jsxFileName,
							lineNumber: 365,
							columnNumber: 15

															setSelectedElements([...selectedElements, element.nombre]);

															setSelectedElements(selectedElements.filter((name) => name !== element.nombre));

_s(Planificacion, "dWRNO30rQ4gGS7Ggaye1B/kGvM4=", false, function() {
	return [useAuth];
});
_c2 = Planificacion;
var _c, _c2;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "DnDCalendar");
$RefreshReg$(_c2, "Planificacion");
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== 'undefined' && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
import * as __vite_react_currentExports from "/src/pages/Planificacion.tsx";
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }

  const currentExports = __vite_react_currentExports;
  queueMicrotask(() => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("c:/Users/Shadow/Desktop/hotelops-pro/src/pages/Planificacion.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("c:/Users/Shadow/Desktop/hotelops-pro/src/pages/Planificacion.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
function $RefreshReg$(type, id) { return RefreshRuntime.register(type, "c:/Users/Shadow/Desktop/hotelops-pro/src/pages/Planificacion.tsx" + ' ' + id); }
function $RefreshSig$() { return RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform(); }

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
